parsed.production_notes: The video consists entirely of 2D vector motion graphics and animated app screencasts. There are no human actors or AI-generated video artifacts.

characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green owl with large eyes, a yellow beak, and small wings.
characters.wardrobe: None, though occasionally wears a black graduation cap.

characters.appearance: A woman with dark skin and black hair styled in a high bun.

scenes.setting: Solid green transitioning to solid blue background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid blue background. In the center, Character A is wearing a black graduation cap and holding a rolled diploma.

scenes.visual_description: An animated smartphone screen appears on a green background, then transitions to a blue background showing a language learning app interface. The interface features the owl mascot holding a diploma.
